zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT於1310年出生時，她的父親Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen1歲，母親Catherina de Gavre29歲。她和Hugues II de Saint-Aubin至少有3個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT于1310年出生时，她的父亲Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen1岁，母亲Catherina de Gavre29岁。她和Hugues II de Saint-Aubin至少有3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LILLE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Lylie, probably from the name of the flower, Middle English lilie, lelie ‘lily’.

English: habitational name from Lelley in East Yorkshire or Lilley in Hertfordshire. The Yorkshire placename probably derives from Old English lǣl ‘twig, brushwood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Hertfordshire placename derives from Old English līn ‘flax’ + lēah.
Irish: Anglicized shortened form of   Allely  .

variants.name: Liley
meanings: English: variant of   Lilly  .

variants.name: Lillie
meanings: English: variant of   Lilly  .

variants.name: Lilley
meanings: English: variant of   Lilly  .

variants.name: Lillis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ethna, Michael Patrick.
Irish and English: metronymic from   Lilly  .

Greek: from the male or female personal name Lili, a pet form of Vangelis (see Vangel ) or of the related female name Evangelia, or of any of various other male personal names ending in -lis, e.g. Anatolis, Vassilis, Gavrilis.

variants.name: Allely
meanings: Irish: shortened form of Mac Ailghile, which Woulfe described as a ‘branch of the Maguires’ in Fermanagh, also found in the shortened Anglicized forms Callaly and Lilly .

variants.name: Lily
meanings: English: variant of   Lilly  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SUR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Abha, Amit, Gopa, Partha, Prabhat, Sandip, Sanjiv, Shakti, Shyama, Sonali, Sumana, Sumit.  Korean Chae, Jin, Jong, Kheng, Ki Suk, Soon, Sun Kyu, Wan.
German: variant of   Sauer  .
Indian (West Bengal) and Bangladeshi: nickname from Sanskrit šūra ‘brave’.

variants.name: Sauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Heinz, Otto, Achim, Dieter, Erwin, Hans, Helmut, Reinhold, Erna, Florian, Fritz.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for an embittered or cantankerous person, from Middle High German sūr, German sauer ‘sour’. In Jewish families, it is mainly artificial, assigned at random by Austrian clerks. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia.
Czech and Slovenian (Šauer): from German Schauer . In Slovenia, it is in part of Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) origin.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT was born in 1310, her father, Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen, was 1 and her mother, Catherina de Gavre, was 29. She had at least 3 daughters with Hugues II de Saint-Aubin.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT est née en 1310, son père, Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen, avait 1 ans et sa mère, Catherina de Gavre, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Hugues II de Saint-Aubin.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT 1310 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen 1 und ihre Mutter Catherina de Gavre 29. Sie hatte mit Hugues II de Saint-Aubin mindestens 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT è nata il nel 1310, sua padre, Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen, aveva 1 anni e sua madre, Catherina de Gavre, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Hugues II de Saint-Aubin.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUTが1310年に生まれた時，父Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhenは1歳，母Catherina de Gavreは29歳であった。彼女はHugues II de Saint-Aubinとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT(이)가 1310년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen(은)는 1세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherina de Gavre(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Hugues II de Saint-Aubin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT nasceu em 1310, seu pai, Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen, tinha 1 anos e sua mãe, Catherina de Gavre, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Hugues II de Saint-Aubin.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT родилась в 1310 г., её отцу по имени Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen было 1 год, а матери, которую звали Catherina de Gavre, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Hugues II de Saint-Aubin.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT nació en 1310, su papá, Thomas II de Lille , Baron de Fresnes-les-Condé and de Blaringhen, tenía 1 años y su mamá, Catherina de Gavre, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Hugues II de Saint-Aubin.
